findings_summary: Dashboard/API delete-route guard smoke passed: hard-delete is blocked for vFinal parent cards and worker subtasks, links are preserved, and a normal disposable task can still be deleted.
tool_or_profile: Hermes v0.16.0 disposable installed runtime with vFinal adapter patches including candidate 0008
runtime_scope: Disposable installed Hermes checkout and isolated HERMES_HOME/HOME; direct Python calls into dashboard plugin route functions; no production dashboard server.

parent_delete_attempt.detail: Overkill Factory cards and worker subtasks cannot be hard-deleted from dashboard/API; close with Receipt Five or archive through an explicit operator-safe path.

worker_delete_attempt.detail: Overkill Factory cards and worker subtasks cannot be hard-deleted from dashboard/API; close with Receipt Five or archive through an explicit operator-safe path.

important_limitations: This proves direct dashboard plugin route functions in a disposable installed Hermes runtime after candidate patch 0008.
It does not start an authenticated HTTP dashboard server.
It does not define the future archive or operator-approved deletion workflow.
It does not authorize updating a real Hermes runtime.
next_action: Add patch 0008 to the update sequence and continue proving remaining dashboard/API route families.
